disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint names that are globally disabled. If a requested touchpoint appears in this list, the offer screen will not open (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN status).

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint names that are globally disabled. If a requested sub-touchpoint appears in this list, the offer screen will not open (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN status).

touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint configurations, each defining offer parameters and launch logic for one or more touchpoints. When a touchpoint is requested, the system finds the first matching entry (by name or names); if none matches, it falls back to the entry with name 'default'.

names.description: Alternative list of touchpoint identifiers that this entry matches. A touchpoint matches if it equals the 'name' field OR is contained in this 'names' list. Allows a single configuration to serve multiple touchpoints.

name.description: Single touchpoint identifier used to match against the requested touchpoint. A special value 'default' serves as the fallback when no other touchpoint matches.

info.description: List of offer parameter configurations for this touchpoint. Each entry defines a distinct offer with its own screens, session tracking, launch logic conditions, and display parameters. Entries are evaluated in order; the first one whose launch logic passes is used.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier for the thank-you popup to display after a successful subscription purchase from this offer.

launch_logic.description: List of launch logic rules defining conditions under which this offer can be shown. Each rule contains range-based, session-based, and feature-flag-based constraints. If any single rule's conditions are all met, the offer is eligible. An empty list means the offer has no constraints and is always eligible.

should_replace_with_ad.description: When true, the subscription offer is replaced with an interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad can be displayed for the mapped touchpoint. Defaults to false.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: When true, the subscription offer is replaced with a rewarded ad in the credits flow. The offer is only shown if a rewarded ad for credits is available for the current touchpoint. Defaults to false.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app installation (inclusive) required to show the offer. A value of -1 (combined with install_day_max = -1) disables this constraint.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum editor-done count (inclusive) required to show the offer. Tracks the number of completed editor actions. A value of -1 (combined with editor_done_max = -1) disables this constraint.

app_session_end.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the app session count range. A value of -1 means no upper limit (offer shows for all sessions >= app_session_start). When both start and end are -1, the constraint is disabled.

editor_done_max.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the editor-done count range. A value of -1 means no upper limit (offer shows for all counts >= editor_done_min). When both min and max are -1, the constraint is disabled.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum per-touchpoint session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. Tracked in-memory per touchpoint+screens composite key. A value of -1 (combined with session_limit_end = -1) disables this constraint.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package IDs. The offer is shown only if the user has previously had a subscription for at least one of these packages. An empty list disables this constraint.

user_had_subscription.description: Whether the user must have previously held any subscription. When true, only users with subscription history see the offer. When false, only users without subscription history see it. When null/absent, this constraint is disabled.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: When true, the subscription offer is replaced with a reward interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad (with min-show-interval check skipped) can be displayed. Defaults to false.

key_session_start.description: Minimum key-session count (inclusive) for the offer's session_key. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty. A value of -1 (combined with key_session_end = -1) disables this constraint.

install_day_max.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the days-since-install range. A value of -1 means no upper limit. When both min and max are -1, the constraint is disabled.

is_ai_credit.description: When present, restricts this launch logic rule to the AI credits flow. When true, the rule applies only if the user is in the credits flow. When false, only if they are not. When null/absent, no credits-flow constraint is applied.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier for the offer screen within this specific launch logic rule. Takes precedence over offer_screen_touch_point when both are present.

repeat_key_session.description: Key-session count modulo interval for repeating the offer. The offer is eligible when ((keySessionCount + 1) % (repeat_key_session + 1) == 0). Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty. A value of -1 disables this constraint.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum user storage usage percentage (inclusive) required to show the offer. A value of -1 (combined with storage_max_percent = -1) disables this constraint.

is_store_available.description: Whether the Google Play Store must be among the active payment service types for this rule to pass. When true, the rule only applies if Google Play is available. When false, only if it is not. Defaults to true.

key_session_end.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the key-session count range. A value of -1 means no upper limit. When both start and end are -1, the constraint is disabled.

repeat_session.description: App session count modulo interval for repeating the offer. The offer is eligible when (appSessionCount % repeat_session == 0). A value of -1 disables this constraint.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier for the offer screen within this specific launch logic rule. Superseded by offer_screen_touchpoint if that field is present.

restricted_packages.description: List of package and offer ID pairs. All entries must pass the promotional offer eligibility check for the offer to be shown. A null or empty list disables this constraint.

package_id.description: The subscription package identifier used to check promotional offer eligibility.

offer_id.description: The promotional offer identifier within the package, used to verify the user is eligible for this specific offer.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier type strings the user must currently have. For subscribed users, the user's current tier type value must be in this list. For non-subscribed users, the list must contain 'free'. An empty list disables this constraint.

app_session_start.description: Minimum app session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. Used with app_session_end to form a range checked via isInRange. A value of -1 (combined with app_session_end = -1) means no constraint; -1 for only this field with a valid end is not a standard usage.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times the offer can be shown per day for this touchpoint. The count resets after 24 hours. A value of -1 means unlimited daily showings.

should_replace_with_reward.description: When true, the subscription offer is replaced with a rewarded ad. The offer is only shown if a rewarded ad is available for the current touchpoint. Defaults to false.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: When true, the offer is skipped if the one-day pass cooldown period has not yet passed (default cooldown is 30 days). When false or null/absent, the cooldown period is not checked.

session_limit_end.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the per-touchpoint session count range. A value of -1 means no upper limit. When both start and end are -1, the constraint is disabled.

storage_max_percent.description: Upper bound (exclusive) of the user storage usage percentage range. A value of -1 means no upper limit. When both min and max are -1, the constraint is disabled.

offer_variant.description: Variant identifier for the offer screen, used to select a specific offer screen variation or A/B test variant.

screens.description: List of screen identifiers associated with this offer configuration. Used to build a composite key (joined with '.') for tracking per-touchpoint session counts.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen for analytics and screen resolution. Takes precedence over offer_screen_touch_point when both are present.

session_key.description: Key used to persist and track the offer's key-session count across app sessions in shared preferences. When non-empty, enables key-session-based launch logic constraints (key_session_start, key_session_end, repeat_key_session).

is_one_time_offer.description: When true, indicates this offer is for a one-time purchase rather than a recurring subscription. Defaults to false.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen for analytics and screen resolution. Superseded by offer_screen_touchpoint if that field is present.
